message:
Switch dependencies from local path refs to crates.io registry versions

Replace local path dependencies with registry versions:
- asupersync 0.2.0 (path) -> 0.2.5 (registry)
- ftui-* 0.2.0 (path) -> 0.2.1 (registry)
- fsqlite-* (path) -> 0.1.0 (registry)

Also remove unnecessary lifetime annotations from Line<'_> return types
across all ops screen modules (alerts_slo, fleet, index_resources,
live_stream, project_detail, timeline) to match updated ftui API where
Line is no longer generic over a lifetime.

Mark tools/optimize_params as publish = false since it is an internal tool.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -5,6 +5,7 @@ description = "CMA-ES hyperparameter optimizer for frankensearch fusion pipeline
 edition.workspace = true
 license-file.workspace = true
 repository.workspace = true
+publish = false
 
 [[bin]]
 name = "optimize-params"
